Title: Verify that checkout page displays all required sections
Preconditions: User has items in the cart and is on the checkout page
Test Steps: 1. Observe all sections displayed on the checkout page
Expected Result: Checkout page displays Contact information section, Shipping address section, Shipping options section and Order summary section
Actual Result: Checkout page displays Contact information section, Shipping address section, Shipping options section and Order summary section

Title: Verify that breadcrumb on the checkout page displays correctly
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the breadcrumb at the top of the page
Expected Result: Breadcrumb displays Home > Checkout. Home is a clickable link
Actual Result: Breadcrumb displays Home > Checkout. Home is a clickable link

Title: Verify that cart icon on the checkout page shows the correct item count and total
Preconditions: User has items in the cart and is on the checkout page.
Test Steps: 1. Observe the cart icon at the top right of the checkout page
Expected Result: Cart icon displays the correct total amount and item count.
Actual Result: Cart icon displays the correct total amount and item count.

Title: Verify that checkout cannot proceed with an empty cart
Preconditions: User has no items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Navigate directly to the checkout page
2. Observe the page behavior
Expected Result: User cannot access checkout. A message indicates the cart is empty and provides a link to continue shopping.
Actual Result: User cannot access checkout. A message indicates the cart is empty and provides a link to continue shopping.

Title: Verify that checkout data persists after page refresh
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid contact information and shipping details
2. Refresh the page
3. Observe the entered data
Test Data:
Email: testuser@example.com
Name: Test User
Address: 123 Test Street
Expected Result: Previously entered checkout information remains populated after page refresh.
Actual Result: Previously entered checkout information remains populated after page refresh.

Title: Verify that user cannot submit duplicate orders by clicking Place Order multiple times
Preconditions: User has completed all required checkout fields
Test Steps:
1. Complete checkout form
2. Click Place Order repeatedly in quick succession
3. Observe the result
Expected Result: Only one order is created. Place Order button becomes disabled or shows a loading state while processing.
Actual Result: Only one order is created. Place Order button becomes disabled or shows a loading state while processing.

Title: Verify that checkout fields retain entered data after validation errors
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email and shipping information
2. Leave one required field blank
3. Click Place Order
4. Observe the form fields
Expected Result: Validation error is displayed. Previously entered data remains populated in all completed fields.
Actual Result: Validation error is displayed. Previously entered data remains populated in all completed fields.

Title: Verify that logged in user's email is pre-filled at checkout
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the checkout page
2. Observe the Contact information section
Expected Result: Email address field is pre-filled with the logged in user's email address
Actual Result: Email address field is pre-filled with the logged in user's email address

Title: Verify that logged in user's saved shipping address is pre-filled at checkout
Preconditions: User is logged in with a saved address and has items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the checkout page
2. Observe the Shipping address section
Expected Result: Shipping address section displays the saved address with the user's name and full address pre-filled
Actual Result: Shipping address section displays the saved address with the user's name and full address pre-filled

Title: Verify that logged in user can edit their shipping address at checkout
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Click the Edit button next to the shipping address
2. Update the address fields
3. Observe the result
Expected Result: Shipping address fields become editable. Updated address is saved successfully and displayed in the shipping address section.
Actual Result: Shipping address fields become editable. Updated address is saved successfully and displayed in the shipping address section.

Title: Verify that logged in user can successfully place an order at checkout
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Confirm email and shipping address are pre-filled
2. Select a shipping option
3. Apply coupon gga100
4. Click Place order
Expected Result: Order is placed successfully and displays the correct order details, including any discounts applied.
Actual Result: Order is placed successfully and displays the correct order details, including any discounts applied.

Title: Verify that checkout page displays guest checkout message
Preconditions: User is not logged in and is on the checkout page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Contact information section
Expected Result: Text displays "You are currently checking out as a guest." Log in link is visible. Create an account checkbox is visible
Actual Result: Text displays "You are currently checking out as a guest." Log in link is visible. Create an account checkbox is visible

Title: Verify that guest user can successfully place an order using a valid email, password and coupon code
Preconditions: User is not logged in and has items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid email address and password in the Contact information field
2. Fill in all required shipping address fields
3. Select a shipping option
4. Apply coupon code (gga100) to make total $0.00
5. Click Place order
6. Observe the result
Test Data:
Email: hey222@gmail.com, Password: sgdhddjdjs224#
First name: Test, Last name: User
Address: 123 Test Street
City: Baltimore
ZIP: 21201
Coupon: gga100
Expected Result: Order is placed successfully. Order received page displays with order number, date, email and total of $0.00
Actual Result: Order is placed successfully. Order received page displays with order number, date, email and total of $0.00

Title: Verify that guest can create an account during checkout
Preconditions: User is not logged in and is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Check the "Create an account with Pams-Store" checkbox
2. Fill in all required fields
3. Apply coupon gga100
4. Click Place order
Test Data:
Email: newguest@test.com
Password: sgdhddjdjs224#
Coupon: gga100
Expected Result: Order is placed. Account is created for the email provided. User can log in after checkout
Actual Result: Order is placed successfully. Account is created for the provided email address. User can log in successfully after checkout.

Title: Verify that Log in link on the checkout page navigates to the login page
Preconditions: User is not logged in and is on the checkout page
Test Steps: 1. Click the Log in link in the Contact information section
Expected Result: User is navigated to the login page
Actual Result: User is navigated to the login page

Title: Verify that checkout fails when the email address field is left empty
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Leave the email address field blank
2. Fill in all other required fields
3. Apply coupon gga100
4. Click Place order
Expected Result: User cannot proceed. "Valid Email address is required" validation message is displayed indicating that the email field cannot be empty.
Actual Result: Order does not proceed, an error message appears telling the user to "Please enter a valid email address"

Title: Verify that checkout fails when an invalid email format is entered
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid email format in the email field
2. Fill in all other required fields
3. Apply coupon gga100
4. Click Place order
Expected Result: Validation error displayed indicating the email format is invalid. Order does not proceed
Actual Result: Order does not proceed, an error message appears telling the user to "Please enter a valid email address"

Title: Verify that checkout fails when required shipping address fields are left empty
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid email
2. Leave all shipping address fields blank
3. Apply coupon gga100
4. Click Place order
Expected Result: Validation errors displayed on all required shipping address fields. Order does not proceed
Actual Result: Order does not proceed, an error message appears on all the required shipping address fields

Title: Verify that selected Country/Region persists after page reload
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Country/Region dropdown in the Shipping address section
Expected Result: Last selected Country/Region remains selected after page reload.
Actual Result: Country/Region dropdown reverts to an earlier selected country instead of the last selected country after page reload. Behaviour is inconsistent

Title: Verify that selected State persists after page reload
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the State dropdown in the Shipping address section
Expected Result: Last selected State remains selected after page reload.
Actual Result: State dropdown reverts to an earlier selected state instead of the last selected state after page reload. Behaviour is inconsistent

Title: Verify that "use same address for billing" checkbox is checked by default
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Use same address for billing checkbox
Expected Result: Checkbox is checked by default
Actual Result: Checkbox is checked by default

Title: Verify that unchecking "use same address for billing" reveals a separate billing address form
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Uncheck the Use same address for billing checkbox
2. Observe the result
Expected Result: A separate billing address form is revealed below the shipping address section
Actual Result: A separate billing address form is revealed below the shipping address section

Title: Verify that phone number field rejects invalid characters
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Enter letters and special characters into the phone number field
2. Complete other required fields
3. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Validation error is displayed indicating an invalid phone number. Order does not proceed.
Actual Result: Validation error is displayed indicating an invalid phone number. Order does not proceed.

Title: Verify that ZIP/Postcode field validates invalid formats
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid ZIP/Postcode value
2. Complete other required fields
3. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Validation error is displayed for the ZIP/Postcode field. Order does not proceed.
Actual Result: Validation error is displayed for the ZIP/Postcode field. Order does not proceed.

Title: Verify that Flat rate shipping option is displayed at checkout
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Shipping options section
Expected Result: Flat rate option is displayed at $1.00 and is selected by default
Actual Result: Flat rate option is displayed at $1.00 and is selected by default

Title: Verify that Free shipping option is displayed at checkout
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the Shipping options section
Expected Result: Free shipping option is displayed as FREE
Actual Result: Free shipping option is displayed as FREE

Title: Verify that selecting Free shipping updates the order total correctly
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page with Flat rate selected
Test Steps:
1. Select the Free shipping option
2. Observe the order summary total
Expected Result: The Total updates to remove the $1.00 flat rate charge. Total reflects the product subtotal only
Actual Result: The Total updates to remove the $1.00 flat rate charge. Total reflects the product subtotal only

Title: Verify that selecting Flat rate adds $1.00 to the order total
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Select the Flat rate shipping option
2. Observe the order summary total
Expected Result: Total updates to include the $1.00 flat rate charge. Total shows subtotal plus $1.00
Actual Result: Total updates to include the $1.00 flat rate charge. Total shows subtotal plus $1.00

Title: Verify that Add coupons section is visible and expandable on the checkout page
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Observe the Add coupons section in the order summary
2. Click the dropdown arrow
Expected Result: Add coupons section is visible. Clicking the arrow expands it to reveal an Enter code field and Apply button
Actual Result: Add coupons section is visible. Clicking the arrow expands it to reveal an Enter code field and Apply button

Title: Verify that applying coupon gga100 gives 100% discount and makes the total $0.00
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page with "Beanie with Logo" and "Belt" added to the cart.
Test Steps:
1. Click the Add coupons dropdown
2. Enter coupon code gga100
3. Click Apply
4. Observe the order summary
Expected Result: Coupon gga100 is applied. Discount of -$73.00 is displayed. Free shipping is applied. Total updates to $0.00
Actual Result: Coupon gga100 is applied. Discount of -$73.00 is displayed. Free shipping is applied. Total updates to $0.00

Title: Verify that applied coupon code is displayed with a remove option
Preconditions: User has applied coupon gga100 at checkout
Test Steps: 1. Observe the order summary after applying the coupon
Expected Result: Coupon code gga100 is displayed with an (cancel) x button to remove it
Actual Result: Coupon code gga100 is displayed with an (cancel) x button to remove it

Title: Verify that removing the applied coupon restores the original order total
Preconditions: User has applied coupon gga100 at checkout
Test Steps:
1. Click the (cancel) x button next to the coupon code gga100
2. Observe the order summary total
Expected Result: Coupon is removed. Discount is reversed. Total restores to original amount of $74.00 including flat rate shipping
Actual Result: Coupon is removed. Discount is reversed. Total restores to original amount of $74.00 including flat rate shipping

Title: Verify that applying an invalid coupon code shows an error message at checkout
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Click the Add coupons dropdown
2. Enter an invalid coupon code
3. Click Apply
4. Observe the result
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating the coupon code is not valid
Actual Result: Error message appears telling user the Coupon "cdhhsdjji" cannot be applied because it does not exist.

Title: Verify that order summary displays all products with correct prices
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page with Belt and Beanie with Logo in the cart
Test Steps: 1. Observe the order summary on the right side of the checkout page
Expected Result: Order summary displays all cart items with their corresponding pricing, discounts, and subtotal.
Actual Result: Order summary displays all cart items with their corresponding pricing, discounts, and subtotal.

Title: Verify that subtotal in the order summary matches the cart total
Preconditions: User is on the checkout page
Test Steps:
1. Observe the subtotal in the order summary
2. Compare it with the cart total
Expected Result: Subtotal at checkout matches the total shown in the cart page
Actual Result: Subtotal at checkout matches the total shown in the cart page

Title: Verify that order received page displays after a successful order is placed
Preconditions: User has completed all checkout fields and applied coupon gga100
Test Steps:
1. Fill in all required fields
2. Apply coupon gga100
3. Click Place order
4. Observe the page that loads
Expected Result: Order received page displays with title "Order received" and message "Thank you. Your order has been received."
Actual Result: Order received page displays with title "Order received" and also a message "Thank you. Your order has been received."

Title: Verify that order received page displays the correct order details
Preconditions: User has just placed a successful order
Test Steps: 1. Observe the order received page after placing an order
Expected Result: Displays the generated order details including order number, date, customer information and final order total.
Actual Result: Page displays Order Number, Date, Email address and Total amount matches the final order amount displayed during checkout.

Title: Verify that order details section displays the correct product breakdown
Preconditions: User has just placed a successful order with Belt and Beanie with Logo
Test Steps: 1. Scroll down to the Order details section on the order received page
Expected Result: Order details display purchased items, subtotal, discounts, shipping information and final total accurately.
Actual Result: Order details display purchased items, subtotal, discounts, shipping information and final total accurately.
